assets.prompt:
Use case: ads-marketing
Asset type: TikTok Shop secondary product image / ad creative
Primary request: Create a before-and-after comparison for INKERASTORY pet soccer jersey portrait canvas.
Left panel: a regular casual phone photo of a dog or cat.
Right panel: the same pet as a beautiful printed canvas, wearing a miniature soccer jersey in sky blue and white vertical stripes, pet name 'BUDDY' and number '10' on front chest (Argentina team colors), no official logos.
Composition: square 1:1, clean split panel, transformation arrow between panels.
Style: clean engaging lifestyle infographic, bright and fun.
Text policy: simple labels 'Your Photo' / 'Your Canvas' only, no watermarks.
Avoid: exact reproduction of official trademarked logos or registered crests, watermarks, platform UI
